rationale: The citing paper references Trusov et al. (2010) only in literature-background passages that list prior studies showing social effects on usage in networked settings. The citation is grouped with other works (e.g., Aral and Walker 2011; Nitzan and Libai 2011) and is used as a generic empirical example, not as a method, measure, or model that the paper adopts. The core identification strategy and analyses rely on the authors' own randomized field experiment and IV design rather than building directly on Trusov et al.'s framework.
